name: gomission
description: Official Mission plugins for Claude Code. Mission is the Trust Graduation gate for agentic work — Claude prepares real work, Mission decides what Claude is allowed to do by action class, evidence, approval, and receipt.

plugins.name: mission
plugins.description: Turn Claude Code into an execution surface for your day. /mission today, /mission week, /mission month generate the actual prompts that run your work through the Mission Trust Graduation gate.
